title: Journeying
subtitle: The living practice
intro: Sufism is not a theory one learns, it is a path one takes. Here lies the heart of the practice: the inner work, the Divine Names, the spiritual poles, the states and stations, the arts of presence.

sections.title: The heart
sections.subtitle: Qalb — the spiritual organ
sections.preview: Not the organ of feeling, but the place of direct knowledge, the mirror in which the Presence is reflected.

sections.title: Love
sections.subtitle: Mahabba, ʿishq — love as a path
sections.preview: From Rābiʿa to Rūmī: pure love, ardent love, love as knowledge and as the death of the ego.

sections.title: Remembrance
sections.subtitle: Dhikr — invocation and presence
sections.preview: To remember God until the whole being becomes that remembrance — vocal, silent, of the heart.

sections.title: The ego
sections.subtitle: Nafs — the carnal soul
sections.preview: The veils, the attachments, the disguises of the ego — and their transformation, stage by stage.

sections.title: Spiritual listening
sections.subtitle: Samāʿ — music, chant, dance
sections.preview: The reed flute that weeps, the drum that beats, the dance that turns — listening as a way of unveiling.

sections.title: The retreat
sections.subtitle: Khalwa — forty days of silence
sections.preview: Initiatic seclusion, the seven stations, the inner colours seen by those who go deep.

sections.title: States & stations
sections.subtitle: Aḥwāl and maqāmāt
sections.preview: The steps of the path: fear, hope, surrender, certainty, love, contentment, extinction, subsistence.

sections.title: Spiritual poverty
sections.subtitle: Faqr — to be poor of self
sections.preview: Not material destitution, but inner stripping-bare. “The faqīr is nothing, and that is why he is everything.”

sections.title: Extinction and subsistence
sections.subtitle: Fanāʾ and baqāʾ
sections.preview: To die to oneself in order to live in Him — then to return to the world, transformed.

sections.title: Trusting surrender
sections.subtitle: Tawakkul — entrusting one's affair to God
sections.preview: Neither passivity nor anxiety. To act fully — while holding nothing to the outcome.

sections.title: The 99 Divine Names
sections.subtitle: Al-Asmāʾ al-Ḥusnā
sections.preview: The most beautiful Names. Each Name is a door, a science, a presence — commented step by step with al-Kāfījī.

sections.title: Metaphysics
sections.subtitle: Scientia sacra · al-ḥikmah
sections.preview: Principial knowledge — the great speculative families (Being, the One, Light, the Self, Perennialist) and their major authors.
